category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Kenya) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Kenya Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入肯尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入肯亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Kenya requirements: KEBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity, the Standardization / Import Standardization Mark (ISM), KS IEC 62133 cell safety, Communications Authority (CA) type approval for wireless, UN 38.3 transport, and in-country importer obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与肯尼亚要求对照：KEBS PVoC符合性证书、标准化标志/进口标准化标志（ISM）、KS IEC 62133电芯安全、通信管理局（CA）无线型号核准、UN 38.3运输及本地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與肯亞要求對照：KEBS PVoC符合性證書、標準化標誌/進口標準化標誌（ISM）、KS IEC 62133電芯安全、通訊管理局（CA）無線型號核准、UN 38.3運輸及本地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Kenya must pass KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) to obtain a Certificate of Conformity, apply the Import Standardization Mark (ISM) on a KS IEC 62133 basis, obtain Communications Authority (CA) type approval for any wireless functions, and hold a UN 38.3 transport test report — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification. Kenya has no EU-style horizontal battery regulation, RoHS, or EPR regime.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口肯尼亚，须通过KEBS出口前符合性验证（PVoC）取得符合性证书、在KS IEC 62133基础上加施进口标准化标志（ISM）、为任何无线功能取得通信管理局（CA）型号核准，并持有UN 38.3运输测试报告——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。肯尼亚没有欧盟式的横向电池法规、RoHS或EPR制度。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口肯亞，須通過KEBS出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）取得符合性證書、在KS IEC 62133基礎上加施進口標準化標誌（ISM）、為任何無線功能取得通訊管理局（CA）型號核准，並持有UN 38.3運輸測試報告——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。肯亞沒有歐盟式的橫向電池法規、RoHS或EPR制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator or standards-body sources (kebs.org, ca.go.ke, unece.org, iec.ch) preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
